name: Red Billy the Bandit King

sheet.name: Red Billy the Bandit King
sheet.background_story:
Beginning as a lowly thief, Billy clawed his way through the ranks of his fellow bandits.

One day, Red Billy snuck into the royal vault of Praxlhold Keep and stole a crown belonging to House Praxl.

Fleeing for his life, Red Billy escaped the Kingdom of Covington on horseback. 

After, Red Billy carved out what is now known as "Bandit Territory", a land of lawlessness and anarchy.
 
He crowned himself the Bandit King and other bandits began to flock to his banner.

description:

After, Red Billy carved out what is now known as "Bandit Territory", a land of lawlessness and anarchy.
 
He crowned himself the Bandit King and other bandits began to flock to his banner.
